Records 1..399 are deterministic fake IndiaMART-style sellers.

records.source: WebERP Chrome inspection on 15 May 2026

contact_context.privacy_note: Masked values are preserved exactly as WebERP displayed them.

sales_service_history.summary: Meeting with Sappan sir regarding services and overall response. Client faced buy lead sold-out/consumption issues and said export buy leads were not reflected in panel. Issue had occurred in past without resolution; needs resolution.
Discussed buy lead consumption, feedback, LMS activity, and complete specifications needed for some products. Client said responses were good.
Meeting with owner Rinku sir about services, feedback, export package, and cashback. Client reported no buy leads in export panel and needed CC team follow-up.
Discussed buy lead preference, category preference, performance report, and preferred cities. Client said no issue as of now.
Client was helped to verify email through a video call.
Discussed buy leads, enquiries, direct enquiry, direct calls, and product rejection. Client was told not to add manufacturer/trader terms in product names.
Visit done twice; owner unavailable. Client reported less response, product rejection with 'Product Name Is Not Clear', and wanted cashback for export leads.

evidence: 22-Apr-2026 upsell meeting mentioned many buy leads could not be consumed.
21-Apr-2026 servicing call discussed buy lead consumption.
pain_points.suggested_action: Start with issue resolution and explain a concrete buy lead consumption plan.

pain_points.category: Export buy lead / export package issue
evidence: 22-Apr-2026 comment says no export buy lead reflected in panel.
29-Mar-2026 owner discussion covered export package and cashback.
pain_points.suggested_action: Verify export lead visibility before pitching export upgrade or retention.

evidence: 15-Jan-2026 product rejection discussed.
09-Jan-2026 error shown: Product Name Is Not Clear.
pain_points.suggested_action: Offer catalog cleanup and product naming guidance.

evidence: 17-Feb-2026 email verification handled through video call.
13-Feb-2026 bounce email notification sent for i***@starcable.co.in.
pain_points.suggested_action: Confirm active email before discussing enquiry delivery.

evidence: 19-Feb-2026 client said leads came from a category they do not deal in.
Preferred cities and category preference were discussed.
pain_points.suggested_action: Review category and city preferences during the call.

model_usage_notes.recommended_call_objective: Service-first optimization call, then soft upsell if issues are resolved.
